name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Connect to backend
        run: |
          curl https://api.example.com/health
        env:
          password: hunter2hunter2
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: AKIAEXAMPLECIBUILD01
